name: logistics carriers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 10–20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile delivery logs with invoicing data instead of manual reconciliation of logs and invoices.
problem_solved: discrepancies between delivery logs and invoicing data
